prompt: A sleek high-end ecommerce product advertisement featuring a pair of glossy black designer sunglasses centered on a futuristic metallic pedestal with rounded corners and glowing blue-white edge lighting. The sunglasses are shown in a three-quarter front view, slightly angled, with thick oversized square-cat-eye frames, dark gray gradient lenses, and subtle gold branding on the temples reading TOUS, plus a small gold bear-shaped logo near the hinge. The setting is a dark sci-fi studio with reflective black and gunmetal surfaces, vertical architectural light strips, soft volumetric glow, and cool neon accents. In the upper right, add a bold promotional text layout with the brand mark {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} above a large stacked headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="SUMMER SALE"}, with SUMMER in white and SALE in bright electric blue, followed by a huge white discount figure {argument name="discount" default="50%"}. Include a thin futuristic blue frame line around part of the headline area. Use dramatic commercial lighting, sharp reflections, luxury product photography styling, shallow depth of field, ultra-clean composition, premium online store ad aesthetic, photorealistic rendering, high contrast, and crisp detail.
translatedPrompt: 一张时尚的高端电商产品广告，展示了一副光泽感十足的黑色设计师太阳镜，置于一个带有圆角和蓝白色边缘发光效果的未来感金属底座中央。太阳镜以四分之三正面视角呈现，略微倾斜，采用厚实的超大方形猫眼镜框，配有深灰色渐变镜片，镜腿上有精致的金色 TOUS 品牌标识，铰链附近还有一个小巧的金色熊形标志。背景是一个深色科幻摄影棚，具有反光的黑色和枪灰色表面、垂直建筑灯带、柔和的体积光以及冷色调霓虹灯点缀。在右上角添加醒目的促销文本布局，将品牌名称 {argument name="brand name" default="Pollo.ai"} 置于巨大的堆叠标题 {argument name="headline text" default="SUMMER SALE"} 上方，其中 SUMMER 为白色，SALE 为明亮的电光蓝，随后是巨大的白色折扣数字 {argument name="discount" default="50%"}。在标题区域的部分周围加入细细的未来感蓝色边框线条。采用戏剧性的商业照明、锐利的反光、奢华的产品摄影风格、浅景深、超简洁的构图、高级在线商店广告美学、照片级渲染、高对比度以及清晰的细节。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华太阳镜夏季促销广告：一张用于设计师太阳镜的未来感电商促销图片，非常适合零售广告、店面横幅以及季节性在线营销活动。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, sci-fi, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon, volumetric, high contrast, shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
